channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Musk’s biggest loyalist became his biggest liability
item.description: I sat down in the Musk v. Altman trial courtroom today, painfully aware that no one was going to ask Shivon Zilis the question on everyone's minds: Girl, what the fuck are you doing? Zilis, who testified under oath that she is the mother of four of Musk's children, was… what's the best way to […]

item.title: 'Not just an aircraft': US Navy MQ-25 Stingray drone hit a major milestone with maiden flight — largest US UAV ever built set to become world's first autonomous tanker to take flight from an aircraft carrier and maybe feature in a Top Gun movie one day
item.description: US Navy’s massive MQ-25 Stingray tanker drone completes maiden flight, marking critical progress toward autonomous carrier refueling.

item.title: Elon Musk’s Last-Ditch Effort to Control OpenAI: Recruit Sam Altman to Tesla
item.description: Messages between Shivon Zilis and Tesla executives reveal plans in 2017 to start a rival AI lab, potentially led by Altman or Demis Hassabis.

item.title: A Star Fox remake is heading to Switch 2 on June 25
item.description: The reimagining of the N64 game offers a more cinematic take.

item.title: Energizer releases coin lithium batteries that won't cause burning if accidentally swallowed
item.description: The Ultimate Child Shield batteries also turn the victim's mouth blue.

item.title: Quordle hints and answers for Thursday, May 7 (game #1564)
item.description: Looking for Quordle clues? We can help. Plus get the answers to Quordle today and past solutions.

item.title: NYT Connections hints and answers for Thursday, May 7 (game #1061)
item.description: Looking for NYT Connections answers and hints? Here's all you need to know to solve today's game, plus my commentary on the puzzles.

item.title: NYT Strands hints and answers for Thursday, May 7 (game #795)
item.description: Looking for NYT Strands answers and hints? Here's all you need to know to solve today's game, including the spangram.

item.title: Vine is coming back, and it’s being relaunched by the guy who killed it — say hello to Jack Dorsey’s Divine, a TikTok and Instagram Stories rival with a ferocious ambition to end AI slop
item.description: Jack Dorsey is relaunching Vine as Divine nearly 10 years after he killed it.

item.title: A 20-minute pitch wins Indian startup Pronto backing from Lachy Groom
item.description: The investment comes as Pronto scales to 26,000 daily bookings and the market heads toward a potential $18 billion size.

item.title: North Korean hackers target gamers with trojanized platform - here's what to look out for
item.description: Popular game platform was compromised and used to deliver backdoors.

item.title: Review: Remarkable Paper Pure is your new entry-level e-ink workhorse
item.description: The Remarkable Paper Pure is more than a replacement for my Remarkable 2. It has longer battery life and a better form factor.

item.title: Nintendo announces a new Star Fox for the Switch 2
item.description: It turns out Fox McCloud's appearance in the Super Mario Galaxy Movie was a tease of things to come: Nintendo just surprise announced the first new Star Fox game in a decade. The game is called, simply, Star Fox, and it's out very soon, launching on June 25th. Nintendo says that it's "based" on the […]

item.title: This foldable, futuristic neck massager will heat your aching muscles and talk to you while it does so — yes, really
item.description: If you're prone to neck pain, the SKG G7 Pro Fold massager could be for you.

item.title: 5 reasons why Pride and Prejudice fans need to watch The Other Bennet Sister
item.description: "The Other Bennet Sister," now on BritBox, tells the story of the much-overlooked Mary Bennet from "Pride and Prejudice."

item.title: This 512GB Dell 15 laptop delivers steady performance for just $307
item.description: A Grade A refurbished Dell 15 (2024) with 8GB RAM and 512GB SSD for just $306.99.

item.title: Barry Diller trusts Sam Altman. But ‘trust is irrelevant’ as AGI nears, he says.
item.description: Barry Diller defended OpenAI CEO Sam Altman, while warning that AGI remains an unpredictable force needing guardrails.
